arts.ttl: I pretended I was a painter rather than admitting I played for Villa
arts.sum: Weimann first met his future wife Jennifer in Mechu, a nightclub on Summer Row in Birmingham city centre, a popular hang-out for Villa players a decade or so ago. Having established himself as a regular Premier League starter and ingratiated himself with the Villa Park faithful you'd have thought Weimann's face, complete with cheeky smile and twinkle in the eyes, would be instantly recognisable around Birmingham.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery's £100m Aston Villa plan after summer transfer business
arts.sum: New signings Ian Maatsen and Ross Barkley are yet to start a Premier League game this term, but both played from the off in the 2-1 win over Wycombe Wanderers in midweek having helped Villa change the game in last weekend's win over Wolves. Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has promised each member of his squad will have a part to play across the season.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane injured in Bayern Munich's draw with Bayer Leverkusen ahead of Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: Harry Kane will be hungry to win honours in his second season at Bayern Munich but has suffered a setback four games into the season after limping out of their title clash against Bayer Leverkusen with a foot injury

arts.ttl: Harry Kane injury latest as Bayern Munich handed huge scare ahead of Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: Harry Kane has provided Bayern Munich with a fresh injury scare four days before they are due to play Aston Villa in the first Champions League fixture at Villa Park in over four decades. Anticipation for Villa's return to Europe's elite club competition has been building ever since finishing fourth last term, and even more so when UEFA's draw last month handed them a rapidly-sold-out league stage tie with Bayern in a repeat of 1982's European Cup final.

arts.ttl: West Ham and Chelsea Want to Sign Jhon Duran in 2025
arts.sum: Aston Villa forward Jhon Duran has been linked with Premier League rivals Chelsea and West Ham.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa star Emi Martinez finds himself in hot water as two-game ban confirmed
arts.sum: Emiliano Martinez will miss Argentina's next two international games after the Aston Villa star was given a two-match ban by FIFA for "offensive behaviour". The 32-year-old goalkeeper repeated his infamous celebrations from the 2022 World Cup shortly after Argentina defeated Chile on September 6.

arts.ttl: Ipswich boss Kieran McKenna pays Unai Emery and Aston Villa ultimate compliment
arts.sum: Ipswich Town manager Kieran McKenna has long admired Unai Emery's work having studied his teams down the years. We will be sending the latest breaking news and top Villa stories directly to the WhatsApp community and we want you to be part of it.

arts.ttl: Team News: Ipswich Town vs. Aston Villa injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Ipswich Town and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Argentina's Emiliano Martinez hit with ban for "offensive behaviour"
arts.sum: Argentina goalkeeper Emiliano Martinez will miss the next two World Cup qualifiers after being hit with a ban for "offensive behaviour".

arts.ttl: West Ham join Aston Villa in the race to sign 23-year-old Serie A attacker
arts.sum: West Ham United are reportedly keen on signing the AC Milan winger Samuel Chukwueze. The 23-year-old has not been able to hit the ground running in Italian football since the move from Villarreal and he is already being linked with an exit from the Italian club.
